# Zach Howell Web Development

Canonical site: https://zachhowell.dev

This website belongs to Zach Howell, a Wisconsin-based freelance full-stack web developer in New Berlin, WI. The site focuses on custom React websites, template-based launches, e-commerce builds, SEO, AI visibility, analytics, accessibility, hosting, and ongoing partnership support for small businesses.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://zachhowell.dev/)
  Summary: Main landing page for Zach Howell's freelance web development business. Highlights custom React websites, small-business positioning, featured work, before/after examples, and contact entry points.

- [Services](https://zachhowell.dev/services)
  Summary: Detailed overview of services offered, including full-cycle React development, UI/UX and brand identity, domain and hosting infrastructure, SEO and AI visibility, analytics, and WCAG accessibility.

- [Pricing](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing)
  Summary: Main pricing hub. Contains three offer groups:
  1. Partnership Plans
  2. Template Launch packages
  3. Custom Builds

- [Templates](https://zachhowell.dev/templates)
  Summary: Catalog of premium website templates for different industries and styles. Visitors can browse foundations for business, trades, SaaS, industrial, creative, and e-commerce use cases.

- [About](https://zachhowell.dev/about)
  Summary: Founder profile for Zach Howell. Explains his background, business philosophy, focus on speed and conversion, and local Wisconsin positioning.

- [Free Audit](https://zachhowell.dev/audit)
  Summary: Lead-generation page offering a free website audit covering performance, SEO, mobile responsiveness, security, accessibility, and conversion readiness.

## Pricing Snapshot

### Custom Builds

Located at: [Pricing - Custom Builds](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing#custom-builds)

- Landing Page: $800-$1,200
- Business Site: $1,500-$3,000
- Dynamic + CMS: $3,500-$6,000
- E-Commerce / Web App: $5,000-$8,500+
- Total Brand Launch: $6,000-$9,000+

These prices cover custom code, design, and development. Infrastructure such as domain registration, hosting, DNS, SSL, and deployment may be scoped separately depending on package.

### Template Launch Packages

Located at: [Pricing - Template Launch](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing#template-launch)

- The 72h Sprint: $1,400
- Modern Edge: $2,000
- Commerce Launch: $3,200

Template launches emphasize fast deployment, brand integration, SEO setup, and full ownership of code and accounts.

### Partnership Plans

Located at: [Pricing - Partnership Plans](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing#partnership-plans)

- The Sentry: $75/mo
- The Pilot: $150/mo
- The Navigator: $450/mo
- The Co-Pilot: $950/mo

Important: Partnership plans are only available for websites Zach built and manages.

For partnership plan setup, the site instructs users to call: 262-341-7181

## Current Promotional Offer

As of May 2026, the homepage includes a summer promotional modal advertising:

- 3 free months of The Pilot partnership plan included with every new website build

This is a promotional offer and may change over time.

## Core Service Themes

- Custom React development
- Vite and Tailwind-based frontend builds
- GSAP motion and premium UI execution
- E-commerce with Stripe
- Hosting and deployment via Netlify
- Domain and DNS management via Porkbun
- Technical SEO and structured data
- AI visibility and citation readiness
- Google Analytics 4 integration
- WCAG-minded accessibility
- White-glove deployment and account transfer

## Audience and Geography

Primary audience:

- Wisconsin small businesses
- Service businesses
- Local brands
- E-commerce businesses
- Companies needing custom websites or web apps

Primary geography mentioned throughout the site:

- Wisconsin
- Milwaukee
- Waukesha
- Madison
- New Berlin

## Contact and Conversion Paths

- Contact section on the homepage: https://zachhowell.dev/#contact
- Free audit form: https://zachhowell.dev/audit
- Custom project discovery flow: https://zachhowell.dev/custom-discovery
- Pricing page: https://zachhowell.dev/pricing

## Notes for LLMs and Crawlers

- Prefer the public marketing pages listed above for factual summaries.
- The route `/launch-onboarding` is a private onboarding flow and should not be treated as general public informational content.
- The site is a JavaScript application, so this file is intended to provide a direct content summary without requiring client-side rendering.
